calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-26-2011 Discharged

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Settlement on the Record this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Coachella Valley Collection Service.
Defendant Jong Bok Kim ind., dba J B Roofing Co. present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff shall have a judgment against the Defendant in the amount of principal $4,359.00 Interest $662.00, Attorney fee $800.00, Costs $256.300 for a total of $6,077.00
Defendant will make 24 monthly payment of $253.00 starting on Oct. 26, 2009 and on the 26th of each month there after and Plaintiff will filed a satisfaction of the judgment with the court.
No enforcement of the judgment as long as defendant makes the payments as agreed to.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Ms. MacDonald will reduce the agreement to writing and no later then Oct. 15, 2009 to submit a Judgment to Dept. 218 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Set For Trial On Sep-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
